headline: Citigroup Downgrades Truist Financial to Neutral, Lowers Price Target to $54
summary: Citigroup  analyst Benjamin Gerlinger   downgrades Truist Financial (NYSE:TFC) from Buy to Neutral and lowers the price target from $63 to $54.
